summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ceraldi ERP iteration 6. All critical features pass: Bilancio Patrimoniale shows ATTIVO=PASSIVO=€169,133.92 and Crediti vs Clienti=€0, Magazzino/manuale displays exactly 12 maintenance products, F24 returns 52 records with €64,868.21 totale_pagato from quietanze, Corrispettivi 2026 has 14 records all with matricola_rt. All pages load without errors.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented, but frontend handles IVA display independently

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: (1) Bilancio Patrimoniale - crediti_vs_clienti=0, ATTIVO=PASSIVO balanced at €169,133.92, (2) Magazzino/manuale shows exactly 12 maintenance products, (3) F24 reads from quietanze_f24 collection with 52 F24s and €64,868.21 totale_pagato, (4) Corrispettivi 2026 has 14 records all with non-empty matricola_rt, (5) All pages load: /bilancio/patrimoniale, /bilancio/economico, /magazzino/manuale, /verifica-coerenza/discrepanze (shows 'Tutti i Dati sono Coerenti!'), /verifica-coerenza/iva, /strumenti (redirects to VerificaCoerenza by design), /integrazioni, /cespiti (shows 1 cespite). Dashboard has no POS Calendar section. IVA mensile API returns 404 but frontend handles this gracefully.
